testcase.name: test_sign_creates_invoice_with_deposit_and_terms

failure.message: AssertionError: assert None == 'Deposit Tester' + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf98a8a2504c0>('signer_name') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf98a8a2504c0> = {'deposit': 1500.0, 'sections': {'change_order_note': 'Cambios por escrito firmados', 'materials': ['Shingles GAF', 'Underlayment'], 'payment_terms': '50% deposit, balance al completar', 'timeline': '5-7 días hábiles', ...}, 'signed_at': None, 'signer_name': None, ...}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_invoice_deposit_terms.py:189: in test_sign_creates_invoice_with_deposit_and_terms assert terms.get("signer_name") == "Deposit Tester" E AssertionError: assert None == 'Deposit Tester' E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf98a8a2504c0>('signer_name') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf98a8a2504c0> = {'deposit': 1500.0, 'sections': {'change_order_note': 'Cambios por escrito firmados', 'materials': ['Shingles GAF', 'Underlayment'], 'payment_terms': '50% deposit, balance al completar', 'timeline': '5-7 días hábiles', ...}, 'signed_at': None, 'signer_name': None, ...}.get
